title: Japan wanted inflation and Iran war could grant that wish. But it's not the type Tokyo desires
summary_full: The Iran war is pushing up "cost-push" inflation in Japan as opposed to the "demand-pull" inflation the BOJ seeks.
summary_public: The Iran war is pushing up "cost-push" inflation in Japan as opposed to the "demand-pull" inflation the BOJ seeks.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iran war could grant that wish
